heading: Game da BicycleRepairStations.com
intro: Kayan aiki kyauta, buɗaɗɗen tushe don nemo tashoshin gyaran keke na jama'a a duk faɗin duniya. An gina shi don masu hawan keke waɗanda suke buƙatar famfo, kayan aiki, ko wurin gyara yayin tafiya.
openSource: Wannan aikin buɗaɗɗen tushe ne kuma yana samuwa a <githubLink>GitHub</githubLink>. Ana maraba da gudummawa, rahoton matsaloli, da buƙatun sabbin abubuwa.
data: Bayanan tashoshi sun fito daga <osmLink>OpenStreetMap</osmLink>, taswira kyauta ta haɗin gwiwa ta duniya. Idan kun sami tashar da ba ta nan ko kuskure, za ku iya gyara ta kai tsaye a OpenStreetMap kuma za ta bayyana a nan.
privacy: Muna girmama sirrin ku. Wannan manhaja ba ta amfani da kukis, babu rajista, kuma babu tattara bayanan sirri. Ana amfani da wurin ku ne kawai a cikin burauzan ku kuma ba a taɓa aika shi zuwa sabobin mu ba.
donate: Idan kun sami wannan kayan aiki yana da amfani, don Allah ku yi la'akari da <donateLink>ba da ƙaramin gudummawa</donateLink> don taimakawa biyan kuɗin masauki da ci gaba da gudanar da aikin.
